channel.description: Lo-fi beats and Southern cooking from a pre-nursing student in Atlanta. I make chill study beats, budget dorm recipes, and honest study-with-me sessions between dining hall shifts and A&P.
channel.keywords: lo-fi beats,study beats,southern cooking,budget recipes,study with me,nursing student,atlanta
channel.title: Hassan Blanchard
